exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: Hampton Inn (pp.102-154) and Hampton Inn & Suites (pp.155-197). Includes open, under construction, and approved hotels. Organized by state.

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest during 2024
exhibits.notes: Hampton Inn (pp.199-202) and Hampton Inn & Suites (pp.203-205).

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by CBH. Balance sheets as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023. Income statements and cash flows for 2024, 2023, 2022. Clean opinion. 9 pages of notes.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement with Addendum
exhibits.notes: Sample only, not for signature. Includes addendum with brand-specific and hotel-specific terms.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific amendments to FA for CA, HI, IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, PR, RI, VA, WA.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Form of contingent liability note for development incentives.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty required from equity owners.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: Governs OnQ system access and use. Runs concurrent with FA. Separate from FA but linked.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents — Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Table of contents only; actual Manual is confidential and loaned to franchisees.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Contact information for state franchise regulators and agents for service.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: State-specific amendments to the FDD. Contains material overrides for franchise registration states.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: StiR Creative Collective restaurant brand program. Not offered to Hampton Inn/Hampton Inn & Suites franchisees.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Standard and mezzanine lender comfort letter templates.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists states with franchise registration laws and FDD effective dates.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: 2 copies of detachable receipt for prospective franchisee signature.
